title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
